not_promoted: Template only; actual Claude Desktop or claude.ai host smoke evidence has not been produced.
Convert this template to a channel-smoke-plan with concrete host commands before running the smoke runner.

clean_environment.purpose: Prove the smoke runs from a clean Claude Desktop/claude.ai profile with no prior Eve connector state influencing the result.
command_template: operator-run
Create or select a clean Claude Desktop/claude.ai profile, confirm Eve is not already connected, and record the profile/account boundary.

entry_url.purpose: Prove the hosted Claude Desktop connector entrypoint preserves tool and claude-desktop install_source through login redirect.
command_template: operator-run
Open ${EVE_PACK12_TARGET}/app/connect?tool=claude-desktop&install_source=claude-desktop and confirm the Auth0 login URL preserves returnTo, tool, and install_source.

install_or_import.purpose: Import the hosted Eve remote MCP connector into Claude Desktop or claude.ai from the clean profile.
command_template: operator-run
Add/import https://mcp.evemem.com/mcp as the Eve Memory remote MCP connector and confirm the Eve tools are visible.

connect.purpose: Complete OAuth/account selection for the Claude Desktop connector and prove the connected MCP tools are usable.
command_template: operator-run
Complete the hosted OAuth/account-selection flow from Claude Desktop/claude.ai and confirm Eve Memory is connected.

store.purpose: Store a synthetic Pack 12 smoke memory from the connected Claude Desktop/claude.ai environment.
command_template: operator-run
Use Claude Desktop/claude.ai's connected Eve MCP tool to store a unique synthetic memory containing ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

read.purpose: Read back the synthetic smoke memory from the same connected Claude Desktop/claude.ai environment.
command_template: operator-run
Use Claude Desktop/claude.ai's Eve MCP read/search tool to retrieve the synthetic memory containing ${EVE_PACK12_SMOKE_ID}.

forget.purpose: Forget the synthetic smoke memory and prove cleanup completes.
command_template: operator-run
Use Claude Desktop/claude.ai's Eve MCP forget/delete path to remove the synthetic smoke memory and confirm it no longer appears in read/search.

install_source_flow.purpose: Prove claude-desktop attribution reaches hosted signup/first-memory attribution.
command_template: operator-run
Inspect server-side event/metric evidence and confirm install_source=claude-desktop is preserved for the connector flow.

connector_install_completed.purpose: Exercise and verify the connector.install.completed event for the Claude Desktop channel.
command_template: operator-run
Trigger connector.install.completed for claude-desktop through the authenticated product path and verify the audit/metric event.

rollback_or_uninstall.purpose: Disconnect/remove the Eve remote MCP connector from the clean Claude Desktop/claude.ai profile and prove rollback leaves no active Eve channel state.
command_template: operator-run
Run the documented disconnect/remove path in Claude Desktop/claude.ai and verify Eve Memory is no longer connected.
